welcome.title: Welcome to School Timetable Manager!
welcome.description: Get started by creating your first academic year. Then add classes, subjects, and teachers to begin generating timetables.

step1.title: Create Academic Year
step1.description: Set up the active academic year with start and end dates.

step2.title: Classes & Divisions
step2.description: Add your school's classes and create divisions within each class.

step3.title: Period Structures
step3.description: Define period structures and assign them to divisions.

step4.title: Subjects & Electives
step4.description: Add all subjects taught at your school and set up elective groups.

step5.title: Teachers
step5.description: Add teachers with their qualified subjects and availability.

step6.title: Assignments
step6.description: Assign subjects and teachers to each division with weekly periods.

step7.title: Generate Timetable
step7.description: Generate timetables for your divisions using the scheduling engine.

fab.conflictsMessage: {{count}} timetable(s) need attention due to data changes.
